questions.question: A production machine suddenly stops due to a mechanical fault. Which department should be contacted first?
A supplier has delayed the delivery of raw materials. Which department should coordinate with the supplier?
Finished coils are ready for shipment after quality approval. Which department takes responsibility next?
An employee joins JSL today. Which department completes onboarding formalities?
A finished product fails inspection due to surface defects. Which department decides whether it should be accepted or rejected?
Raw material stock has fallen below the minimum level. Which department should initiate replenishment?
An operator reports abnormal vibration in a production machine. Which department should inspect it?
Monthly salary processing is about to begin. Which department performs this activity?
Management requests a report on production costs for the previous month. Which department prepares this information?
Which department works most closely with both Production and Dispatch before products leave the plant?
Maintenance helps reduce production downtime.
Dispatch can ship products before Quality approval.
Procurement is responsible for selecting and coordinating with suppliers.
Finance is responsible for recruiting employees.
Warehouse personnel maintain stock records.
Production cannot function effectively without coordination with other departments.
Quality inspections help prevent defective products from reaching customers.
Maintenance is responsible for preparing financial statements.
Why is coordination between Production and Maintenance important?
What action should the Quality department take if a product fails inspection?
How does Procurement support uninterrupted production?
Why is inventory management important for Warehouse operations?
Name two responsibilities of the Finance department.
How does the HR department contribute to organizational success?
